---
title: "Bias Mitigation Pipeline in AI-Driven Hiring Processes"
author: "Muhammad Ahmad (19166-MA1266)"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
---

```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(tidyverse)
library(tidymodels)
library(DALEX)
library(fairmodels)
library(patchwork)
library(pROC)

source("R/01_data_preparation.R")
source("R/02_eda_bias_detection.R")
source("R/03_modeling_reweighting.R")
source("R/04_fairness_evaluation.R")
source("R/05_xai_explainability.R")
```

## Phase 1 - Data Preparation

```{r data-prep}
df <- load_hiring_data("data/final_bias_hiring_dataset.csv")
split_obj <- create_train_test_split(df, prop = 0.7, seed = 1266)
train_df <- split_obj$train
test_df <- split_obj$test

dim(df)
summary(df)
```

## Phase 2 - EDA & Bias Detection

```{r summary-by-gender}
summary_gender <- df %>%
  group_by(Gender) %>%
  summarise(
    applicants = n(),
    avg_cgpa = mean(CGPA, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_skills = mean(Skills_Score, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_interview = mean(Interview_Score, na.rm = TRUE),
    selected_rate = mean(Final_Decision == "Selected"),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
summary_gender
```

```{r rates-and-di}
selection_rates_by_gender(df)
disparate_impact_ratio(df)
```

```{r plots-eda, fig.width=10, fig.height=10}
p1 <- plot_selection_rates(df)
p2 <- plot_distributions_by_gender(df)
p1 / p2
```

```{r correlation-heatmap, fig.width=8, fig.height=6}
plot_correlation_heatmap(df)
```

```{r dalex-initial}
initial_explainer <- build_initial_dalex_explainer(train_df)
initial_mp <- model_parts(initial_explainer)
plot(initial_mp)
```

## Phase 3 - Modeling with Bias Mitigation

```{r modeling}
trained <- train_models(train_df, test_df)
metrics_table <- bind_rows(lapply(trained$results, function(x) {
  x$metrics %>% mutate(model = x$label, .before = 1)
}))
metrics_table
```

## Phase 4 - Fairness Evaluation

```{r fairness}
fairness_table <- build_fairness_table(trained)
fairness_table
```

```{r fairmodels-object, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
fair_objects <- build_fairmodels_object(trained)
str(fair_objects, max.level = 1)
```

## Phase 5 - XAI (Explainable AI)

```{r xai, fig.width=10, fig.height=6}
explainer_list <- lapply(trained$results, function(x) {
  build_dalex_explainer(x$fit, train_df, x$label)
})

plot_feature_importance(explainer_list[[1]])
```

```{r breakdown}
obs <- test_df %>% slice(1) %>% select(-Final_Decision, -Applicant_ID, -Applicant_Name)
bd <- breakdown_single_prediction(explainer_list[[1]], obs)
plot(bd)
```

```{r pdp}
pdp <- partial_dependence_profile(explainer_list[[1]], "Skills_Score")
plot(pdp)
```

```{r roc-group, fig.width=10, fig.height=6}
roc_df <- bind_rows(lapply(trained$results, function(x) {
  roc_by_gender(x$predictions, x$label)
}))
plot_roc_by_gender(roc_df)
```

## Phase 6 - Error Analysis

```{r confusion-by-gender}
confusion_by_model_gender <- bind_rows(lapply(trained$results, function(x) {
  x$predictions %>%
    group_by(Gender) %>%
    group_modify(~ broom::tidy(conf_mat(.x, truth = Final_Decision, estimate = .pred_class))) %>%
    mutate(model = x$label, .before = 1)
}))
confusion_by_model_gender
```

```{r fpr-fnr}
error_rates <- bind_rows(lapply(trained$results, function(x) {
  compute_group_rates(x$predictions) %>% mutate(model = x$label, .before = 1)
}))
error_rates
```

```{r performance-table}
performance_table <- metrics_table %>%
  select(model, .metric, .estimate) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = .metric, values_from = .estimate) %>%
  left_join(fairness_table, by = "model")

performance_table
```
